creator: zab@zltech.eu
text:
CHECK/QA:
- update: from 2.25.2 (postgres+php74) to 2.25.5 (postgres+php80):
core functions seem OK, no changes seen in user flows (tested on postgres backend)
- DB schema: unchanged
- new install: core functions work well
- poudriere: OK (12.3R, 13.1R, with/without my,pg,plugins in all combinations)
- portlint: no new WARNs/ERRs
